'''Budpock''' was a long time supporter of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]-aligned [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Meridian sector/Legends|Meridian sector]]. However, the world was also a haven for [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] gangs. Many of these groups were provoked by [[Dzym]] to attack neighboring [[Ampliquen]], breaking the truce between Budpock and Ampliquen.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1stm}}
*[[Scourge (novel)|''Scourge'']] {{1st}}
